title: 7 Things a Godly Man Does First, Before He Ever Leads
caption:
Every man wants the authority. Not many want what it costs to earn it.

Christ didn't lead by demanding the room. He led by going first into the cost: first to kneel, first to serve, first to take the hit that wasn't his.

A godly man does the same thing in small rooms nobody's filming. He apologizes before the other guy does. He does the job nobody claps for. He carries the blame so his guys don't have to.

"He emptied himself, taking the form of a servant." — Philippians 2:7

That's the whole blueprint. Save this before you ask anyone to follow you anywhere.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #leadership #discipleship #scripture #christianity
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
